item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision - American Society for Quality
item.description: Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how AI and Machine Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy. Learn how AI pipelines achieve unmatched precision with minimal latency.

item.title: Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026 - Zetamotion
item.description: Defect detection is only one piece of modern machine vision. In this webinar recap, we unpack the 2026 trends shaping AI quality control, from data bottlenecks to synthetic data and edge deployment.

item.title: Join Spotscale and Kiwa on the Future of Concrete Inspection
item.description: Spotscale will be speaking at Kiwa's upcoming webinar on October 10 at 13:00 CET. Together, we will dive deep into how AI and high-resolution 3D modeling are redefining the maintenance of critical infrastructure.

item.title: Page: inVISION Day – Metrology - Open Webinar World
item.description: The inVISION Day Metrology is a free online event

item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision - American Society for Quality
item.description: Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how AI and Machine Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy. Learn how AI pipelines achieve unmatched precision with minimal latency.

item.title: AI-Driven Power Line Inspection & Defect Detection Webinar - AeroMegh
item.description: Join us for this exclusive webinar where we'll demonstrate how AeroMegh's advanced GeoAI platform revolutionizes power line inspection and maintenance. Discover how AI-powered drone technology can dramatically improve grid reliability while reducing operational costs.

item.title: How AI is transforming Machine Vision I 1st webinar of series - SICK
item.description: Powered by AI deep-learning technology, SICK Nova offers both on-device and cloud-based tools for complex defect detection, sorting and counting as well as classification tasks. By teaching the vision sensor using examples instead of manually setting up rules, users can quickly solve even complex applications with ease.
